name: Ersfjordbotn
description: Classic fjord aurora spot with mountains and reflections.

name: Kattfjordvatnet
description: Large lake offering unobstructed sky views and aurora reflections.

name: Grotfjord
description: Dark fjord area north of Kvaloya with wide northern horizon.

name: Sommarøy
description: Small island with extremely dark skies and ocean horizon.

name: Sandvika Beach
description: Wide beach near Sommarøy with open sky views.

name: Skulsfjord
description: Quiet fjord area popular with aurora photographers.

name: Tromvik
description: Small fishing village with minimal light pollution.

name: Grunnfjord
description: Remote fjord location with little traffic or lighting.

name: Telegrafbukta
description: Popular aurora viewing spot close to Tromsø city center.

name: Prestvannet
description: Lake in Tromsø with darker skies than downtown.

name: Fjellheisen / Storsteinen
description: Cable car viewpoint overlooking Tromsø with panoramic sky.

name: Fløya
description: Mountain above Tromsø with 360-degree sky visibility.

name: Vardentoppen
description: Hilltop viewpoint with wide night sky visibility.

name: Breivikeidet Valley
description: Dark valley east of Tromsø often used by aurora tours.

name: Oldervik
description: Quiet coastal village with good northern sky exposure.

name: Lyngseidet
description: Lyngen Alps region with dramatic mountain aurora views.

name: Skibotn
description: Dry inland valley known for clearer skies than the coast.

name: Signaldalen
description: Dark inland valley often used as a cloud-escape aurora location.

name: Kilpisjärvi
description: High elevation Finnish Lapland aurora hotspot.

name: Nordjeteen
description: Waterfront viewpoint right in central Tromsø, an easy walk from downtown with bus access at Sentrum.

name: Skihytta
description: Ski lodge on the slopes above the city with less light spill than downtown, served by the Ekrehagen bus stop and parking.

name: Nordspissen
description: Northern tip of Tromsøya with an open view over the water, reachable via the Nesland bus stop with parking on site.

name: Kattfjordeidet
description: Isthmus on Kvaløya between Kattfjorden and the open sea, with parking on site and dark skies away from the city.

name: Vasstrand
description: West-facing beach on outer Kvaløya with an open sea horizon and a marked parking area.

name: Rekvikvegen
description: Quiet roadside pull-in on Kvaløya, parking available, with minimal surrounding light.

name: Grøtfjord – Litlevatnet (Kvaløya)
description: Lakeside spot at Litlevatnet near Grøtfjord on Kvaløya, offering still-water reflections and a parking area.

name: Tønsvika
description: Coastal village east of Tromsø with parking available and darker skies than the city centre.

name: Finnvikdalen - Sørskaret
description: Valley pass on Kvaløya near Finnvik, across Sandnessundet from Tromsøya, well away from city lights, with a parking area.
